rationale: Review 2's bundling finding is real (diff lines 34-37 define AffineAlgGroup with both finiteType+geomReduced fields) and material under scope; acting on its split fixes the roadmap violation while also excising the True stubs/IsUnipotent. Review 1 misses this, retains the bundled foundation, and references unshown Targets.lean changes that the diff does not contain, so its resulting PR is strictly worse.
